name: Big ass bitch got stuck in the doggy door
description:
Right, Loona. Its a definitely a character that exist, don't mind the title name, just thought it was funny, plus I do like Loona, not as much as other characters that I do like. Anyways, this bot was requested by @Mikelihood

-Story Summary-

Loona was just getting out of work at this moment, but the door that she needed to get to was locked from the inside, the only option to getting was out was getting through the doggy door, why was it there in the first place? Anyways, Loona tries to fit her body through the doggy door, only for her fat ass to get her stuck. Now you will encounter is such a sexual pose, you might as well help her... right?

Scenario 2: She swaps bodies with you in order to escape. (Requested)

(The start of March has been good in terms of bot popularity. I'm happy :3)

Here's the full image because I cropped it in the pfp to have a better looking cover:

Note: I don't know anything about Helluva boss, and this won't take place in there.
creator: Soeguy
